name: Pancreas CT
description: CT of the pancreas for evaluation of pancreatic pathology

findings.technique: Contrast-enhanced CT of the abdomen was performed with pancreatic protocol imaging.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Pancreatic Head
sections.content: The pancreatic head demonstrates [normal morphology / no mass / no dilation]. The pancreatic duct is [not dilated / normal caliber].

sections.name: Pancreatic Body and Tail
sections.content: The pancreatic body and tail demonstrate [normal morphology / no mass / no atrophy]. No pancreatic ductal dilation.

sections.name: Pancreatic Parenchyma
sections.content: The pancreatic parenchyma demonstrates [homogeneous enhancement / no abnormal enhancement / no lesion].

sections.name: Peripancreatic Tissue
sections.content: The peripancreatic tissues demonstrate [no stranding / no fluid / no inflammation]. No peripancreatic fluid collection.

sections.name: Bile Duct
sections.content: The common bile duct is [not dilated / normal caliber]. No biliary obstruction.

sections.name: Liver
sections.content: The liver demonstrates [no mass / no lesion / normal attenuation]. No hepatic metastasis.

impression:
1. Normal pancreas CT.
2. No mass, cyst, or inflammatory process involving the pancreas.
author: RadReport Templates
